---
name: Feedback
about: Report friction or improvement ideas — structured responses help maintain quality
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: feedback
---

## Which file does this relate to?

- [ ] CLAUDE.md
- [ ] skills/loop-engineering/SKILL.md
- [ ] templates/loop-triage/loop-triage.md
- [ ] templates/evaluator-agent/loop-reviewer.md
- [ ] templates/github-actions/loop-triage.yml
- [ ] docs/
- [ ] Other

## What type of feedback?

- [ ] A rule caused friction on a task where it shouldn't apply
- [ ] A rule is missing that would prevent a failure I experienced
- [ ] Token cost is too high for my project's context budget
- [ ] A template didn't work as described
- [ ] Documentation is unclear or incorrect

## What happened?

_Describe the task, what the agent did, and what you expected instead._

## Which rule or section was involved?

_e.g. "§4 Surgical Changes" or "the evaluator agent's REJECT verdict format"_

## Suggested change?

_Optional. A concrete proposed edit is more useful than a general direction._

---

_Note: This repo is intentionally opinionated. PRs that add new files, community
sections, or framework-specific variants will not be merged. Feedback that improves
the existing files is welcome._
